---
title: "The Theory of Quantum Information"
subtitle: "Study Notes & Roadmap"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

## 学習状況ダッシュボード

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
### 現在のフォーカス: Chapter 1
数学的基礎（線形代数、スペクトル分解、ノルム）の再確認を行っています。

[👉 Chapter 1 のノートを開く](chapters/chapter1.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.callout-note}
## 進捗率
- **Chapter 1**: 🚧 10%
- **Chapter 2**: 🌑 0%
- **...**
:::
:::

:::

## 教科書目次と学習ノート

| Chapter | Title | PDF (Original) | Notes (解説) | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--: | :--: | :--: |
| **0** | Front Matter | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter0_FrontMatter.pdf) | - | ✅ |
| **1** | Mathematical Preliminaries | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter1_Math.pdf) | [📝 Note](chapters/chapter1.qmd) | 🚧 |
| **2** | Basic Notions of Quantum Information | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter2_Basic.pdf) | [📝 Note](chapters/chapter2.qmd) | 🌑 |
| **3** | Similarity and Distance | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter3_Distance.pdf) | - | 🌑 |
| **4** | Unital Channels and Majorization | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter4_Unital.pdf) | - | 🌑 |
| **5** | Quantum Entropy and Source Coding | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter5_Entropy.pdf) | - | 🌑 |
| **6** | Bipartite Entanglement | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter6_Entanglement.pdf) | - | 🌑 |
| **7** | Permutation Invariance | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter7_Permutation.pdf) | - | 🌑 |
| **8** | Quantum Channel Capacities | [📄 PDF](../divided/Chapter8_Capacity.pdf) | - | 🌑 |

: 学習進捗一覧 {#tbl-progress}
